human_review_summary: V016 is acceptable and better than V015 because lower-body/legwork/line-stealing is visible. However, the lower-body section lasts a bit too long, and the current particle effects are weak or worse than no effect. Future direction should reduce lower-body duration and improve particle aesthetics.
strengths: action variation improved versus repeated hand exchange
limitations: lower-body section lasts a bit too long
current VFX does not improve impact enough
not approved as replacement for V013 CUT01
v017_direction: return faster to close upper-body hand/elbow/palm/shoulder exchange
preserve only a short lower-body cut-in or off-balance beat
use particles as elegant contact/environment feedback rather than generic sparks
particle_fx_lesson: generic tiny sparks, colored glow, and simple streaks can look cheap
future prompts need specific particle shape, source, trajectory, duration, density, and dispersal
particles should not obscure body mechanics
if particles cannot look good, fewer particles are better than cheap particles
recommended_next_step: prepare SHOT-02-V017 package with short legwork beat plus high-quality particle aesthetic direction
exact_submit_command_summary: dreamina multimodal2video --image <Fenshou upload-safe JPG> --image <Shuangji upload-safe JPG> --image <Temple upload-safe JPG> --prompt <manual_SHOT-02-V016_uploadsafe_hand_foot_line_steal_prompt.txt content> --duration 5 --ratio 16:9 --video_resolution 720p --model_version seedance2.0_vip
query_result_summary: Status-only query_result attempt 1 returned gen_status=success with one mp4 result, queue_status=Finish. One authorized query_result --download_dir command downloaded the result.
result_note: Downloaded result still requires human visual review; do not mark final or locked.
submit_result_note: submit_id is not final success; query/download still requires separate future human authorization
intended_use: optional SHOT-02 hand-foot line-stealing correction experiment
clip_role: second clip in possible long fast-combat multi-clip section
replacement_policy: cannot replace locked V013 CUT01 unless human explicitly approves future replacement
action_strategy: break repeated hand exchange through lower-body / legwork / line-stealing / off-balance / counter-re-entry
fx_strategy: micro contact feedback only; no large VFX

input_references.duty: Fenshou identity only. Black/red armored male warrior, face, hair, armor, silhouette, body type, aggressive forward pressure.

Highest-priority Shuangji female identity protection only. Female face, female identity, silver-blue high ponytail, blue-silver armor collar/shoulders, white-blue robe panels, calm sharp expression. Do not use as action/rhythm/scene/camera reference.
Rainy ancient temple courtyard, frontal main-hall axis, wet stone floor, cinematic environment only. Do not use as character identity reference.

failure_modes_addressed: V015 micro-FX did not compensate for weak choreography
allowed_next_action: Prepare SHOT-02-V017 package with shorter lower-body beat and stronger particle/aesthetic direction; any future submit still requires explicit human approval.
